name: Intercom Ticket Escalation to Slack
description: Webhook-triggered escalation: routes high-priority Intercom conversations to Slack with an AI-generated summary.
longDescription: Listens for new Intercom conversations or tag events via webhook. Evaluates each conversation for VIP customer flag, priority tags, and SLA breach risk. Escalated conversations get an OpenAI-generated 2–3 sentence summary and are posted to #cs-escalations with full context. Includes an optional non-AI fallback branch for teams that prefer raw excerpts.
